description: Shared missing/path-separator token rejections and the delete DELETE path. Confirm-gate and non-string/empty text diverge (see report).

cases.name: rejects a token with path separators
cases.expect_error: token must not contain path separators, query separators, or traversal segments

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This cancels an account service transfer. Set confirm=true to proceed.
